title: Voice API Integration to a Web Avatar
description: Integrate a Voice API with a web-based avatar to enable voice functionalities.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Voice API Integration to a Web Avatar (DEM-2026-0010)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to enhance the customer digital experience by integrating voice functionality into a web-based avatar using a Voice API. This enhancement will create more interactive and accessible user engagement.

Business Value/Impact  
Integrating voice capabilities will improve customer interaction, increase user satisfaction, and differentiate our digital platform. This can lead to higher customer retention and potential revenue growth.

Risk Mitigation  
To address medium-level risks, thorough testing and phased deployment will be conducted. Additionally, continuous monitoring and contingency plans will ensure swift issue resolution and maintain system stability.
